Profiles.Name: Scarecrow
Profiles.Command: /bin/zsh -lc 'chflags nohidden $HOME/path/to/scarecrow/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/_scarecrow.pth 2>/dev/null; $HOME/path/to/scarecrow/.venv/bin/scarecrow; rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo; echo "Scarecrow exited with error. Press Enter to close."; read; else sleep 3; fi'
